name: Angelica Liqueur
recipeIngredient: 3 to 6 anise or fennel seeds, crushed
1 tablespoon Chopped fresh marjoram, leaves or 1 teaspoon dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all herbs, nuts and spices with vodka in a quart or larger aging container. Cap tightly.
2. Shake daily for 2 weeks.
3. Strain through a fine muslin cloth or coffee filter; discard solids.
4. Clean out the aging container.
5. Place liquid back into the container.
6. In a saucepan, combine sugar and water and stir to combine over medium heat.
7. When sugar is completely dissolved, set aside and let cool.
8. When cool, combine with food coloring (optional) and add to liqueur. Cap and allow to age in a cool, dark place for one month.
